content_fingerprint: hugging face adds auto served agents md endpoint to all gradio spaces every gradio space on hugging face now automatically serves a machine readable agents md endpoint allowing ai coding agents like claude code codex and pi to interact with spaces without manual setup hugging face announced on april 17 2026 that every gradio space on its platform now automatically serves an agents md endpoint this endpoint provides a structured machine readable api description that ai agents can read and invoke directly eliminating the need for developers to configure integrations manually according to the cha
